name: East County Pickleball Courts
description:
East County Pickleball Courts is an indoor sports facility exclusively focused on Pickleball. 

We are the largest dedicated indoor pickleball facility in the State of Oregon with 12 courts.

Our courts are temperature-controlled with 36,000 square feet of space to play in and take a seat to enjoy a beverage and a snack.  We have 5 bathrooms, music playing overhead, free lockers, equipment to rent or purchase, and plenty of parking for you and your friends. 

We are 15 minutes from the Portland International Airport and conveniently located for the neighboring cities of Portland, Hood River, Happy Valley, Sandy, Gresham, Fairview, Wood Village. Plus we are less than 30 minutes from Vancouver, WA via the I-205 bridge.

Our easy freeway access to I-84 makes our courts an ideal location for regional and national tournaments. 

We look forward to seeing you on the courts!

name: Western Oregon University - Peter Courtney Health and Wellness Center
description:
Access is either through a day pass or a term membership. Please visit wou.edu/campusrec/memberships/ for more information on Community Memberships.

Parking is available with six metered spots that cost $.25 per 30 minutes for individuals who do not have a WOU parking permit. Additionally, those six metered spots are to be used for ADA parking (be sure to display your state-issued disability placard, as you do not have to pay the meter), and there is free on-street parking on Jackson St West. Unfortunately, parking tickets do get issued if you park in Lot R or the meter runs out.

Please give us a call if you have any questions at 503-838-9530.
